threat_model.next_review_trigger: Review before production certification, when Control Plane or Runtime Plane trust boundaries change, when new write tools are added, or after any credential exposure.

required_gates.evidence: scripts/security/validate_dependency_policy.py; Dependency Review; CodeQL; Actions-BOM; release SBOM

token_scope_reviews.environment_scope: Use environment-specific GitHub secrets or repository environments for dev, staging, and prod.
token_scope_reviews.minimum_scope: Allow only the Cloudflare account and resources required by the selected deploy or smoke workflow; Worker script write permission is required only for deploy jobs.
token_scope_reviews.runtime_exposure: GitHub Actions runner environment only; never written to logs, artifacts, examples, or release evidence.
token_scope_reviews.rotation: Rotate in Cloudflare and update the matching GitHub Actions secret before production certification or immediately after suspected exposure.

token_scope_reviews.environment_scope: Use target-environment-specific Worker secrets and GitHub Actions secrets.
token_scope_reviews.minimum_scope: Prefer endpoint-scoped tokens for runtime clients; use the all-scope automation token only for trusted workflows that need all protected endpoints.
token_scope_reviews.runtime_exposure: Worker secret and trusted GitHub Actions automation only; runtime clients use SCAS_CONTROL_API_TOKEN from environment variables.
token_scope_reviews.rotation: Rotate the Worker secret and GitHub Actions secret together, then rerun protected-route preflight checks.

token_scope_reviews.environment_scope: Use Worker secrets and GitHub Actions secrets only for workflows that deploy or smoke the AI Gateway route.
token_scope_reviews.minimum_scope: Provider key only; Cloudflare AI Gateway handles routing and policy.
token_scope_reviews.runtime_exposure: Worker secret and runner-local secrets file during deploy; the temporary file is deleted by the workflow.
token_scope_reviews.rotation: Rotate with the provider and update the Worker/GitHub secret before live certification or after exposure.

token_scope_reviews.environment_scope: Optional Cloudflare Authenticated Gateway token scoped to the target AI Gateway configuration.
token_scope_reviews.minimum_scope: Gateway authentication only; not a replacement for the OpenAI provider key.
token_scope_reviews.runtime_exposure: Worker secret and GitHub Actions secret for fresh deploy/smoke workflows when Authenticated Gateway is enabled.
token_scope_reviews.rotation: Rotate independently from OPENAI_API_KEY and redeploy the Worker route before repeating live smoke evidence.

token_scope_reviews.environment_scope: Use environment-specific SSH credentials for dev, staging, and prod runtime hosts.
token_scope_reviews.minimum_scope: SSH access only to the target Runtime Plane host and the required deployment user.
token_scope_reviews.runtime_exposure: GitHub Actions runner temporary key file only; workflow validates private OpenSSH key format before use.
token_scope_reviews.rotation: Rotate host authorized keys and GitHub Actions secret before production certification or immediately after exposure.

data_plane_boundaries.boundary: Cloudflare Control Plane must not store raw Runtime Plane traces or tool outputs.
Runtime Plane artifacts remain on Hetzner and are referenced by URI in evidence.
Control API protected endpoints require bearer authorization.
Release evidence must not include secret values or raw runtime artifacts.
